style_effects: Flickering translucent purple mist particles drift slowly around the body, elongating shadows bending unnaturally in the air. A dim, eerie violet aura pulses gently around Geodude, casting distorted reflections on nearby surfaces. The lighting mood is cold and haunting with a faint purple glow, evoking a sense of ancient mystery. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
